(async()=>{[...document.body.children].forEach(el=>{const cs=getComputedStyle(el);if(cs.position==='fixed'&&parseInt(cs.zIndex||0)>40)el.remove()});const v=document.getElementById('view-mermas');document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(x=>{if(x!==v)x.classList.remove('active')});v.classList.add('active');let n=v.parentElement;while(n&&n!==document.documentElement){n.classList.remove('hidden');if(getComputedStyle(n).display==='none')n.style.display='block';n=n.parentElement}const l=document.getElementById('listMermas');l.innerHTML=Array.from({length:4},(_,i)=>`
PRODUCTO DE PRUEBA LARGO ${i+1}
775024325303${i}
−40.0undde 50
✓ 10 ya recuperadas⚠ 99d sin resolver
📍 ZONA-0211/7/2026
`).join('');await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,350));const card=l.querySelector('.merma-card');return{cardW:Math.round(card.getBoundingClientRect().width),visible:card.getBoundingClientRect().height>50};})()
